name: ai-daily-skill
description: AI news daily digest Claude Code skill that automatically fetches, analyzes, and categorizes AI frontier news from smol.ai. Generates structured Markdown reports and optional styled HTML pages, social cards, and Xiaohongshu covers.
scan_summary: Python-heavy skill with RSS fetching, Claude API proxy usage, email notification, and image generation. Requires third-party API key (ZHIPU_API_KEY) routing through a Chinese AI proxy (bigmodel.cn) instead of official Anthropic endpoints. No LICENSE file present. Dependencies include anthropic, feedparser, requests, python-dateutil. .env.example present with credential placeholders.
